_about: Provenance for the committed Phase 1A fixtures. All captured 2026-07-18 in one session against the live BBX endpoints via scripts/capture_phase1a_fixtures.py-equivalent calls. Times are UTC; those marked approx were reconstructed from capture-session file mtimes (per-response stamping was not in place at capture — the capture script now records exact stamps on re-run). Prices are pounds; no redactions beyond removing Algolia _highlightResult (search-highlight metadata). No tokens/cookies/account-ids are present in any response body.
algolia_index_snapshot_note: Algolia objects carry their own index_last_update stamp; observed values were '18-07-2026 1pm' (multi/sole hits) and '18-07-2026 12pm' (deep book) — i.e. a periodically-reindexed snapshot up to ~2-3h behind capture time, and stamps differ per object. Store this separately from the scanner's own observed-at time.

fixtures.query: stock_origin:'BBX' AND parent_sku in ['20171135668','20158024224'] (discovered via new_to_bbx:'1 Day' sweep, then confirmed by direct parent_sku query)

fixtures.notes: One entry per format per SKU; 20158007342 has 7 formats.

3 variants. Captured BEFORE the settled version below. The newly-created offer 169009 (£240) was already present in REST (least_listing_price=240) and Algolia but had not yet propagated to GraphQL. This ordering is the basis of the eventual-consistency finding.
4 variants (settled). ~4 min after the lagging capture; offer 169009 now present. listing_id set {133111,137028,164943,169009} exactly matches Algolia purchase_options.
30 offers; listing_id range 668..168993; prices shared by >1 offer: {500:5, 450:4, 400:2, 390:2}.
